input: From ai-agents PR #1887. A shared push-guard framework hosts 4 guards (markdownlint, marketplace counts, session-log placeholders, PR description vs diff). Dispatcher has 1 MiB stdin cap, command-shape verification, git diff with ACMR filter + fallback chain, glob filtering, structured BLOCKED output, fail-open on infrastructure errors. Is the framework complexity justified for 4 guards?
